text:
Created attachment 223636
pkg-static: Unable to access file

The compilation works perfect, however when the "Registering installation for bitkeeper-7.3.3_6"-step comes, i get those errors:

pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/devel/bitkeeper/work/stage/usr/local/bitkeeper/RELEASE-NOTES.md:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/devel/bitkeeper/work/stage/usr/local/bitkeeper/b64wrap:No such file or directory

I tested on two machines, one fresh installed and on my Workstation.

The full log in attachment.
